title: Andryala webbii
taxonomy: Andryala webbii is classified as a species within the genus Andryala and the family Asteraceae. The genus Andryala is part of the tribe Tarchonantheae, which is a group of plants commonly known as 'dandelion family'. Andryala webbii is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the phylum Angiospermophyta, and it is further classified into the kingdom Plantae. This species is native to the Canary Islands, a Spanish archipelago in the Atlantic Ocean. Andryala webbii is considered an endemic species, meaning it is only found in this specific geographic area.
